{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Enforcer Trial
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Enforcer Trial]] is a trial that [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] challenge.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
